Off Calendar Nov-17-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

Osc Re: Preliminary Injunction is off calendar in light of the ruling on the motion to compel arbitration.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Kelley Anne DeYoung, CSR #6780. (302/HK)

Vision Service Plan Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Nov-17-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Attorney Craig Steinberg telephone number 818-879-7919 for all Plaintiffs.
Andrew Struve of Manatt, Phelps & Phillips, LLP telephone number 714-338-2757 for Defendant Vision Service Plan.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, Vision Service Plan's Motion To Compel Arbitration is granted for the reasons stated on the record and reflected in the Court Reporter's transcript. The prevailing party is to provide a form of order that tracks the Court's ruling and show compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Kelley Anne DeYoung, CSR #6780. (302/HK)

Osc Re: Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Sep-14-2016 Continued To Nov-17-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Craig S. Steinberg, OD (818-879-7919) appears as counsel for pliantiffs/opposing parties

Attorneys, Andrew H. Struve and Nicole Wasylkiw of Manatt Phelps & Phillips LLP (714-338-2757) appears as counsel for defendant/moving part.

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter.

Osc Re: Preliminary Injunction is CONTINUED to November 17, 2015 at 9:30 AM in Department 302. There will be further briefing on the sole issue of whether or not the Federal Arbitration Act precludes the application of 1300.71.38, or whether there's reverse preemption, such that 1300.71.38 preempts the Federal Arbitration Act and can be applied irrespective of Federal Arbitration Act. Counsel agree and the Court sets a briefing schedule. Defendant, Vision Service Plan's brief is due on or before September 28, 2016. Plaintiffs' opposition brief is due on or before October 12. The vision service plan may file reply on or before October 26.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry L. Sawyer, CSR #59761, email: ssawyer@sftc.org. (D302)
